name: pin
description: Pin + Protocol disciplines for agent-driven research: lock design decisions against silent rollback, make every data element traceable to code, and keep the human genuinely in the loop.

interface.shortDescription: Pin design decisions and audit research lineage.
interface.longDescription: Pin keeps agent-driven research understandable by locking design decisions against silent rollback, tracing conclusion-bearing data to code, and guiding machine, adversarial, and human grounding checks.
defaultPrompt: Use pin-aware-agent for this research task
Audit the pins in this project
Check whether this result has traceable data lineage
